prompt: A polished Japanese fashion magazine cover illustration in elegant contemporary editorial style, vertical full-page composition. The cover title is a huge teal serif masthead reading "AURA" across the top. In the upper right, include 4 stacked issue details: "6", "June 2025", "No.126", and a small boxed label "アウラ", followed by the price line "特別定価 ¥980". The background is a bright pale blue sky with soft white clouds. Center the portrait of an androgynous, ethereal young model, shown from chest up, wearing a crisp white tailored jacket with subtle gold piping, a white shirt, a vivid aqua-teal vest or tie layer, and a gemstone-like star brooch at the collar. The character has very long, layered, windswept hair in icy white with pale aqua tint, with glossy strands flowing across the shoulders, and fair luminous skin. The face is largely obscured by a centered rectangular censor block in muted gray-blue to pale pink gradient, covering the eyes, nose, and upper cheeks; the visible lower face shows a soft mouth and refined chin. One hand is raised near the lips in a thoughtful fashion-portrait pose. Use delicate anime-inspired linework, airy lighting, translucent highlights, and luxury beauty-editorial rendering. Add 3 left-column cover blurbs in Japanese with teal headlines and smaller black body text: first, "透明感をまとう 初夏のスキンケア" with 2 smaller lines beneath; second, "好印象をつくる 爽やかカラー術" with 2 smaller lines beneath; third, "プロが教える 美しい髪の条件" with 2 smaller lines beneath. Add a teal circular badge on the right with 4 lines of white text: "Special Interview", "風と光と、", "自分らしさと。", and "ソラが語る 日常と美学". Near the lower center, place a small italic English line "Cover & Special Feature" above the large Japanese main headline "ソラ、という名の透明感。" with the first word in teal and the rest in black. Under that, add 2 lines of smaller Japanese subheadline text. Along the bottom edge, create 3 feature teasers with pale italic English category labels and Japanese copy beneath: left label "Fashion", center label "Beauty", right label "Trend", each with 2 short Japanese lines. Overall mood: serene, luxurious, airy, refreshing early-summer beauty fashion cover with cohesive aqua-and-white color design.
